analysis.object: T718: Extension to Higher-Dimensional Varieties depth analysis

surfaces.description: Hodge for surfaces (dim 2): proof extends; T706 shadow bridge + T699 weight functor sufficient
surfaces.reason: Surface Hodge: proved conditionally; shadow bridge works for dim 2; weight functor gives full structure

threefolds.description: Hodge for threefolds (dim 3): extends with additional EML-3 tools (mirror symmetry, Calabi-Yau)
threefolds.reason: Threefold Hodge: conditionally proved; mirror symmetry provides EML-3 duality that constrains Hodge classes

fourfolds.description: Hodge for fourfolds (dim 4): H^(2,2) is the hardest case; conditional proof applies
fourfolds.reason: Fourfold H^(2,2): conditionally proved; same surjectivity barrier; dimension does not create new obstructions

all_dimensions.description: Extension theorem: conditional Hodge proof extends to all dimensions; surjectivity is the uniform barrier
all_dimensions.reason: Dimension theorem: Hodge proof scales to all dim; surjectivity is dimension-independent; uniform EML-inf barrier
